violations.text: Commercially packaged beverages were observed held past 'enjoy by date'. Foods were removed from retail sale and held for vendor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
One fan for reach-in freezer was not operational during time of inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the grab and go and fast and fresh refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
